tasks.subject: Task 1: Engine + builder arity 0–2
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Shared engine plus FanOut (arity 0), FanOut<T1>, FanOut<T1,T2> (temporary ceiling), proving fail-fast/cancellation semantics through arity 2.

**Files:**
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOutEngine.cs
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOutArray.cs
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOut.cs
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOutBuilders.cs
- Delete: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Placeholder.cs
- Test: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Threading/FanOutBuilderTests.cs

**Verify:** dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~FanOutBuilderTests"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOutEngine.cs", "src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOutArray.cs", "src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOut.cs", "src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOutBuilders.cs", "tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Threading/FanOutBuilderTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~FanOutBuilderTests\"", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-26-parallelfanout.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Builder arity 3–8
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend the builder ladder to arity 8; add Add<T3> to FanOut<T1,T2> and define FanOut<T1,T2,T3> … FanOut<T1..T8> (arity 8 = ceiling, no Add<TNext>).

**Files:**
- Modify: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOutBuilders.cs
- Test: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Threading/FanOutBuilderTests.cs

**Verify:** dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~FanOutBuilderTests"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOutBuilders.cs", "tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Threading/FanOutBuilderTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~FanOutBuilderTests\"", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-26-parallelfanout.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Static void WhenAll overloads
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Static void WhenAll overloads on FanOut — fixed arity 2–8 plus an IEnumerable overload.

**Files:**
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOut.StaticVoid.cs
- Test: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Threading/FanOutStaticVoidTests.cs

**Verify:** dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~FanOutStaticVoidTests"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOut.StaticVoid.cs", "tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Threading/FanOutStaticVoidTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~FanOutStaticVoidTests\"", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-26-parallelfanout.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Static typed WhenAll overloads
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Static generic WhenAll<T1..Tk> overloads (arity 2–8) returning a ValueTuple.

**Files:**
- Create: src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOut.StaticTyped.cs
- Test: tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Threading/FanOutStaticTypedTests.cs

**Verify:** dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~FanOutStaticTypedTests"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/JoakimAnder.Toolbox/Threading/FanOut.StaticTyped.cs", "tests/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Tests/Threading/FanOutStaticTypedTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~FanOutStaticTypedTests\"", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-26-parallelfanout.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Example + documentation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Runnable example of the motivating scenario plus README and CHANGELOG updates.

**Files:**
- Modify: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples/Program.cs
- Modify: README.md
- Modify: CHANGELOG.md

**Verify:** dotnet run --project examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples/Program.cs", "README.md", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet run --project examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-26-parallelfanout.md"}
```
